title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
summary: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.

title: Pudgy Penguins expands retail footprint with Target trading card rollout
summary: The NFT-born franchise is bringing its Vibes Series 3 trading cards to Target stores across the US as it expands into physical products and mainstream retail.

title: Brazil’s Lula Holds Lead Against Bolsonaro After Bank Scandal
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva maintained his lead in polls on the Brazilian presidential election against Senator Flavio Bolsonaro, who is weighed down by his ties to a former banker involved in the country’s biggest bank fraud scandal.

title: Pointed News Quiz | Bonds, Streaming, Yogurt
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion 
Prediction market giant Kalshi is exploring a potential IPO for 2027 or 2028 after annualized revenue surpassed $2 billion.

title: Bitcoin Network Activity Is Rising as BTC Falls Nearly 50% Below Peak Price: CryptoQuant
summary: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

title: Charles Schwab Planning to Roll Out S&P 500 Prediction Markets With Cboe: WSJ
summary: Global financial institution Charles Schwab is the latest firm hoping to steal a piece of the growing prediction market pie.

title: Andre Cronje, two others resign from Sonic Labs board as S token trades 97% below its peak
summary: Sonic Labs said the three "remain invested in Sonic's success" but will no longer make business decisions for the Layer 1 network, formerly Fantom.

title: TD Cowen says CME has the upper hand in lawsuit against CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
summary: "We expect CME will seek a preliminary injunction to block perps as the case proceeds," said TD Cowen's Jaret Seiberg.

title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz after Israel and Hizbollah exchange fire
summary: Setback for Donald Trump’s push to end war with the Islamic republic

title: Big Tech is stoking unrest in the UK. Why?
summary: Elon Musk’s amplification of anti-immigrant sentiment in Belfast, Southampton and beyond cannot be explained by ideology alone
